metadata.title: Payments workspace
metadata.description: Track wallet status, payout readiness, and payout lifecycle details.

home.title: Payments
home.description: Review your wallet, action queue, and payout readiness in one place.

organization.label: Organization
organization.help: Choose the organization wallet to review.
organization.invalidDescription: The selected organization could not be loaded for your account. Choose another organization and retry.

shell.loadingDescription: We are preparing wallet and payout information for this organization.
shell.emptyDescription: Create or join an organization to start managing payout cycles from this workspace.
shell.degradedDescription: We could not load the latest payments information. Retry to refresh this workspace.

queue.title: Action queue
queue.actionNeededDescription: Items that need Race Director action to keep payout readiness moving.
queue.inProgressDescription: Items currently managed by platform processing.
queue.actionNeededGuidance: Review this item before requesting the next payout cycle.
queue.inProgressGuidance: Keep monitoring this item while platform processing continues.

request.title: Payout request
request.description: Enter an amount in MXN minor units to request the next payout cycle.
request.amountHint: Leave empty to request the current max withdrawable amount.
request.submitHint: Submitting creates a payout quote and lifecycle request.
request.queuedHint: If an active payout exists, you can queue this request as the next intent.
request.conflictDescription: This Race Director workspace already has an active payout lifecycle. Queue a request to run when the current cycle finishes.

errors.invalidAmount: Enter a valid positive amount in minor units.
errors.submitFailed: Payout request could not be created right now.
errors.queueRequiresAmount: A valid amount is required to queue a payout intent.
errors.queueFailed: Queued payout intent could not be created right now.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Review current and historical payout lifecycle states.
payouts.emptyDescription: Your payout requests will appear here once you submit the first payout cycle.

detail.title: Payout detail
detail.description: Inspect lifecycle progress, reason codes, and statement availability.
detail.noEvents: No lifecycle events are available for this payout request yet.
detail.notFoundDescription: The selected payout request could not be found for this organization.

statement.notFound: Statement is not available for this payout request.
statement.notTerminal: Statement will be available after payout reaches a terminal status.
statement.error: Statement could not be loaded right now.
